belongs_to_collection.name: Attack on Titan - Music to Listen to While Inside Paths

response.original_title: Attack on Titan - Music to Listen to While Inside Paths (2)
response.overview: Pretty much all of the songs have been edited in some capacity, but here's the original tracklist:  0:00 Swardy - Here On My Own  2:21 The Strokes - Call It Fate, Call It Karma  6:13 HOME - Resonance  10:22 Aphex Twin - Rhubarb  15:24 Melodysheep - Subterranean  17:37 Aphex Twin - Stone in Focus  21:20 Johann Johannsson - Sun's Gone Dim  26:09 Michael FK & G. Strizzolo - Branwen  30:58 Apparat - Goodbye
response.title: Attack on Titan - Music to Listen to While Inside Paths (2)
